title: Record: 11L VR + GA + LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT (val_bpb=pending)
author: amaljithkuttamath

data.description: Learned lambda blends first-block V into subsequent blocks, adding 2 params per layer
Per-head sigmoid gate on attention output with learned weight matrix and bias initialized near-open
Replaces relu² in MLP to preserve negative gradient flow

parameters.description: Every token scored before training on it; last 2 blocks and norms unfrozen

novel_contributions: Integration of Value Residual (ResFormer) with learned lambda blending first-block V into subsequent blocks
Use of Gated Attention with per-head sigmoid gating on attention outputs
Replacement of relu² with LeakyReLU(0.5)² in MLP to preserve negative gradient flow
Implementation of legal score-first test-time training (TTT) where each validation chunk is scored before training on it
Ablation studies confirming the impact of Value Residual and Gated Attention
Use of EMA with decay 0.997 and cosine learning rate schedule
Compliance with competition rules by switching from pre-eval TTT to legal score-first TTT
